series.curator_notes: Series spans multiple artists: 'Die Wilden Hühner' (main Hörspiel series, 2022-2023), 'Die Wilden Küken' (spinoff series for younger children, 2010-2014), and various Cornelia Funke artist entries. The main series has 5 numbered episodes (Folge 1-5) plus the film adaptation 'und das Leben' as episode 6. 'Die Wilden Küken' is a separate spinoff series with 7 episodes (numbered 2-10, missing 1, 5, 7). Note: Episodes appear duplicated across multiple artist IDs due to various collaborations credited on Spotify.
